requirement: Rewire web-ui from commodity matching-engine endpoints to securities-service endpoints for MSE equities demo

tasks.title: API service + types — securities endpoint rewiring
tasks.description:
Rewire the web-ui API layer and type definitions to work with securities-service.

## 1. src/web-ui/src/services/api.ts
Add `'X-GarudaX-Tenant': 'mse-equities'` to the headers object in apiRequest() alongside the Authorization header.

## 2. src/web-ui/src/types/instrument.ts
Replace the Instrument interface to match securities-service response:
```typescript
export interface Instrument {
  id: string;
  isin: string;
  ticker: string;
  name: string;
  asset_class: string;
  security_type: string;
  exchange_code: string;
  lot_size: number;
  tick_size: number;
  currency: string;
  listing_date: string;
  trading_status: string;
  outstanding_shares: number;
}
```
Keep InstrumentDetail and Ticker interfaces but update InstrumentDetail to extend new Instrument.
Remove commodityName, deliveryMonth, deliveryLocation, symbol fields.

## 3. src/web-ui/src/components/InstrumentSelector.tsx
- Change fetch from `/instruments?status=active` to `/securities/instruments`
- Parse response as `{ data: Instrument[] }` instead of `{ instruments: Instrument[] }`
- Replace `inst.instrumentId` → `inst.id` everywhere
- Replace `inst.symbol` → `inst.ticker`
- Replace `inst.commodityName` → `inst.name`
- Remove ticker polling to `/market-data/ticker` (not available for securities yet)
- Display: ticker + name + trading_status

## 4. src/web-ui/src/pages/Trading.tsx
- Change instrument fetch: `/instruments?status=active` → `/securities/instruments`, parse `data` array
- Change `state.selectedInstrument?.instrumentId` → `state.selectedInstrument?.id`
- Change order submission: `/orders` → `/securities/orders`
- Add orders list fetch: GET `/securities/orders` with tenant header, display in bottom panel
- Change trade history fetch: `/trades/history` → `/securities/trades`, parse `data` array
- Remove or stub polling for `/clearing/positions`, `/margin`, `/settlement/cycles` — these return errors for securities demo
- Keep the layout structure unchanged

## 5. src/web-ui/src/components/OrderEntry.tsx
- Change submit URL from `/orders` to `/securities/orders`
- `instrumentId` prop is now `inst.id` from parent
- Order body fields are already compatible (instrument_id, side, order_type, quantity, price, time_in_force)

## 6. src/web-ui/src/components/InstrumentInfo.tsx
- Fetch from `/securities/instruments/{id}` instead of `/instruments/{id}`
- Map response fields to display

## 7. src/web-ui/src/components/Chart.tsx
- Keep chart but stub the data fetch if `/market-data/candles` returns error
- Show 'No chart data' placeholder on error

## 8. src/web-ui/src/components/Positions.tsx
- Keep component but handle empty positions gracefully
- Replace `pos.instrumentId` → `pos.instrumentId` (keep — positions still use this field from clearing)

## 9. src/web-ui/src/components/TradeHistory.tsx
- Update to handle securities-service trade format from `{ data: [...] }`
- Map securities trade fields (id, instrument_id, price, quantity, side, created_at)
- Replace `inst.instrumentId` → `inst.id` in filter dropdown

## 10. src/web-ui/src/contexts/MarketContext.tsx
- Update `Instrument | null` references — new Instrument uses `id` not `instrumentId`
- The `selectedInstrument.instrumentId` references throughout need to become `selectedInstrument.id`

## 11. src/web-ui/src/hooks/useOrders.ts
- Read this file and update if it calls old endpoints

After all changes:
```bash
cd src/web-ui && npm install && npm run build
```

The build MUST succeed. Fix any TypeScript errors.

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Update web-ui tests for securities fields
tasks.description:
Update all existing tests in src/web-ui/src/__tests__/ to match the new securities-service field names and response formats.

Read the handoff from T1: .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

Key changes to apply in tests:
- `instrumentId` → `id` in Instrument mocks
- `symbol` → `ticker`
- `commodityName` → `name`
- `{ instruments: [...] }` → `{ data: [...] }` in mock responses
- `/instruments?status=active` → `/securities/instruments`
- `/orders` → `/securities/orders`
- `/trades/history` → `/securities/trades`
- API headers must include `X-GarudaX-Tenant: mse-equities`

Run: cd src/web-ui && npx vitest run
All tests must pass.

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md

tasks.title: Build and deploy web-ui container
tasks.description:
Build and deploy the updated web-ui.

1. cd /home/vcp/ace-platform/src/web-ui && npm run build
2. Verify build succeeds with no errors
3. docker compose build web-ui
4. docker compose up -d web-ui
5. Verify https://trade.garudax.asla.mn/ loads
6. Test login: curl the auth endpoint, get a token, verify /securities/instruments returns data through the trade portal's proxy

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T3.md
